title: Unique Enchanted Books
description: A resource pack that resprites each of the enchanted book types to be unique.
body:
This is a vanilla resource pack that edits and resprites each and every type of Enchanted Book to be unique, and including the level.

Will not work if multiple different enchantments are on the same book, however.

This pack was built off of Vader's Stacked Items pack. Most of the book designs have been altered/upgraded. Download it here (1.12): https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/vaders-stacked-cit-programmer-items-pack
